programme.title: A-List Playlist
programme.desc: Alleen de beste nummers van de beste internationale `A-List' artiesten die de wereldwijde ranglijsten veroverd hebben worden gedraaid.

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
programme.desc: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

programme.title: Saved By The 90s!
programme.desc: If you need a bit of a break from modern pop, then look no further! The 90s are here to save us, so enjoy these giant hits from a golden decade of music.

programme.title: 90's Mixtape
programme.desc: No-nonsense, hand-picked selection of 90's pop, R'n'B and dance videos from the MTV vaults.

programme.title: 40 Videos that Defined the 90s!
programme.desc: So many music videos kept us glued to our TVs in the 1990s, we're bringing you the best 40 decade-defining ones right now!

programme.title: MTV's sounds of 1994!
programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the second decade of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1994!

programme.title: Alternative 90s Anthems!
programme.desc: The 90s gave us some incredible alternative anthems and we're playing a bunch of them for you right now!

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
programme.desc: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

programme.title: 40 90s Boybands vs Girlbands!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the bands as the 90s boys take on the 90s girls in our top 40 countdown. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: MTV's sounds of 1995!
programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the second decade of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1993!

programme.title: 90's Mixtape
programme.desc: No-nonsense, hand-picked selection of 90's pop, R'n'B and dance videos from the MTV vaults.

programme.title: This Is How We Do 90s Hip Hop & R'n'B
programme.desc: They certainly knew how to do hip hop and R'n'B in the 90s! Check out all of the biggest hits right here.

programme.title: MTV's sounds of 1996!
programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the second decade of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1996!

programme.title: Alternative 90s Anthems!
programme.desc: The 90s gave us some incredible alternative anthems and we're playing a bunch of them for you right now!

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
programme.desc: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

programme.title: Saved By The 90s!
programme.desc: If you need a bit of a break from modern pop, then look no further! The 90s are here to save us, so enjoy these giant hits from a golden decade of music.

programme.title: Never Forget The 90s
programme.desc: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.

programme.title: 40 Heartbreak Hits of the 90s!
programme.desc: You're going to need a big box of tissues for this one because we're bringing you 40 heartbreak hits from the 90s!

programme.title: MTV's sounds of 1999!
programme.desc: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the second decade of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1999!

programme.title: Truly, Madly, Deeply... 90s Love!
programme.desc: Fall in love with the 90s all over again as we play you a selection of the very best ballads the decade had to offer!

programme.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
programme.desc: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

programme.title: Girl Power Hour!
programme.desc: It's all about girl power! Tune in for all the biggest girl power hits from the 90s.

programme.title: Never Forget The 90s
programme.desc: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.

programme.title: 90's Mixtape
programme.desc: No-nonsense, hand-picked selection of 90's pop, R'n'B and dance videos from the MTV vaults.

programme.title: Boys vs girls: 90s hits battle!
programme.desc: The boys are taking on the girls in our playlist of back to back classic 90s hits! The result? Everyone's a winner!

programme.desc: The 90s gave us some incredible alternative anthems and we're playing a bunch of them for you right now!

programme.title: Top 50 90s Rocks!
programme.desc: Put on your denim/leather/parka jacket and grab your grunge/thrash/indie air guitar! We are rocking out to 50 of the most awesome anthems from the 1990s!

programme.desc: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.

programme.desc: Get ready to sing your heart out to this selection of 90s power ballads! You don't want to miss a thing!
